continuity_risk: Lu Mi can drift into a literal deer-person; keep features cultural and subtle.
Li Tang can drift too close to Bai Yi; keep dark military physicality and avoid Qingming white official styling.
Gu Huaizhang is registry priority 3 but included because the user explicitly requested him in this P2 batch.
